use_cases: Landing page hero for AI-powered SaaS products showcasing brand identity
Marketing site entry section with animated background to capture attention
Product launch pages requiring visual impact with smooth shader effects
Brand-focused landing pages for tech-forward companies
ai_summary: A full-viewport hero section featuring an animated MeshGradient shader background with customizable colors, distortion, and swirl effects. Includes title, description, and CTA button with glass-morphism styling. Built for tech and AI brands seeking a visually striking landing experience with smooth animations and modern typography using Satoshi font family.
